frame_analyses.description: Both Maryland grasper and scissors are visible around pattern edge.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Initial grasp of gauze for stability.

frame_analyses.description: Beginning incision into the circular pattern with scissors.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Entry point at guide line, good initial cut.

frame_analyses.description: Cutting progresses clockwise around the circle.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Steady cutting motion, no deviations noted.

frame_analyses.description: Switch to counterclockwise cutting as completing path around circle.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth transition and cut maintained along guide.

frame_analyses.description: Ending cut, removing gauze circle from the pattern.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Circle completed neatly with edges aligning well with guide.

confidence_rationale: Clear visibility of cutting path and technique; no deviations observed.
technique_summary: Expert performance with precise cutting and efficient use of tools.
strengths: Accurate cutting along the guide lines
